arts.ttl: Liverpool handed new Mohamed Salah contract verdict as key transfer point made
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is out of contract in June and could leave Liverpool at the end of the season

arts.ttl: Kvaratskhelia BOMBSHELL: Liverpool & Chelsea given transfer hope
arts.sum: The Georgia winger is interested in joining PSG before the January window shuts, but the Ligue 1 giants aren’t able to fund a deal as things stand, which could help the likes of Chelsea and Liverpool hijack his proposed move to the French capital. TEAMtalk have revealed that Liverpool could use Federico Chiesa in a player-plus-cash swap deal for Kvaratskhelia, while Chelsea are eyeing his situation as they consider signing a new forward amid Mykhailo Mudryk’s current provisional suspension.

arts.ttl: Liverpool have an ace up their sleeve that could help them sign Khvicha Kvaratskhelia - opinion
arts.sum: Liverpool weren’t particularly busy in the summer transfer window, but with the January market now open, they may well look to make some more moves....

arts.ttl: Report: Man United and Liverpool target Kvaratskhelia’s preference made clear
arts.sum: Manchester United target Khvicha Kvaratskhelia has his eyes on a move to Paris Saint-Germain. Reporter Ben Jacobs has revealed that the Napoli winger is hopeful of a switch to the Parc des Princes above all else. It was recently revealed that Kvaratskhelia was wanted by United, though the club are unable to currently afford him.
